welcomeBody: Your divine companion on the path to inner peace, guided by the timeless wisdom of the Bhagavad Gita.
purposeSubtitle: Select all that resonate with you
gitaSubtitle: This helps Sakha tailor wisdom to your level
practiceSubtitle: When would you like your daily spiritual reminder?
readyVerse: "You have the right to perform your prescribed duties, but you are not entitled to the fruits of your actions."
readyBody: Enable daily reminders to stay on your spiritual path, or begin exploring now.
